name: Pets First NFL Seattle Seahawks Dog Bed, Multicolor
description: Give your furry fan the paw-fect spot to watch the game with the Pets First NFL Seattle Seahawks Dog Bed. This officially licensed NFL dog bed features a fun stitched football plus an embroidered Seahawks logo. This fan-favorite bed was made with your pal’s warmth and comfort in mind—the soft plush cover is stuffed with cozy polyfill for a quality sleeping experience. And best of all, the entire bed is machine washable for easy cleanups.
